intentSynonyms: get a download url in powerpoint
look up a download url in powerpoint
fetch a single download url in powerpoint
view one specific download url in powerpoint
get a download url for a file in powerpoint
description: Get a temporary download URL for a file. The URL is pre-authenticated and expires after a short time.

format.description: Convert to this format before downloading — pdf, jpg, or png. Omit for original format.
